meaning: n.世界一周旅行,周游世界
examples: The player can pass circumnavigation of a slide in game.
Mr. Piccard was part of a team that carried out the first non-stop circumnavigation of the earth in a balloon.
Though Magellan didn't complete the entire circumnavigation, as the expedition's leader he is usually credited with being the first man to circle the globe.
The balloon completed its circumnavigation of the world shortly before 1000 GMT on Saturday.
His achievement now sees him join an elite list of about 300 people who have completed solo-circumnavigation sails.
